---
title: "Home"
format: html
---

# From genomic data to interpretable evidence

I build analytical workflows that connect **data processing, statistical analysis, and interpretation**. My portfolio focuses on reproducible bioinformatics and clear reasoning about what results do and do not support.

## Featured project

### From genomic data to statistical interpretation

This project combines a lightweight RNA-seq workflow demo with an interactive Shiny app on odds ratios, uncertainty, and sample size. Together, they show how raw data become structured outputs and how those outputs become interpretable evidence.

[View the project](projects/genomics-to-insight.qmd)

## Tools and themes

- RNA-seq
- Nextflow-style workflow design
- R and Shiny
- DESeq2
- Quarto
- Reproducible analysis
- Statistical interpretation
